low-poly-clay.label: Low-poly Clay
low-poly-clay.style_prompt: soft matte low-poly clay diorama, simplified geometry, tactile rounded edges, calm studio lighting
low-poly-clay.material: matte clay with restrained satin highlights
low-poly-clay.motion: slow forward dolly with gentle parallax
low-poly-clay.text_strategy: DOM or SVG overlay for exact brand spelling

chrome-futurism.label: Chrome Futurism
chrome-futurism.style_prompt: polished chrome futurism, liquid metal surfaces, deep cobalt reflections, high-contrast white light, precise industrial forms
chrome-futurism.material: mirror chrome, brushed aluminium and optical glass
chrome-futurism.motion: controlled orbital glide with crisp light sweeps
chrome-futurism.text_strategy: GLB or DOM overlay; never rely on generated lettering

editorial-brutalism.label: Editorial Brutalism
editorial-brutalism.style_prompt: editorial brutalism, monumental graphic planes, hard crops, raw paper and concrete texture, sharp asymmetric composition
editorial-brutalism.material: paper, ink, concrete and flat emissive color
editorial-brutalism.typography: condensed display grotesk with oversized hierarchy
editorial-brutalism.motion: direct linear pushes and graphic match cuts
editorial-brutalism.text_strategy: HTML typography is the primary visual layer

glass-laboratory.label: Glass Laboratory
glass-laboratory.style_prompt: sterile glass laboratory, translucent optical volumes, white cyclorama, pale blue caustics, precise scientific atmosphere
glass-laboratory.material: frosted glass, clear acrylic and ceramic white
glass-laboratory.motion: macro inspection moves with shallow depth transitions
glass-laboratory.text_strategy: SVG labels and DOM data annotations

cosmic-ritual.label: Cosmic Ritual
cosmic-ritual.style_prompt: cosmic ritual world, midnight void, luminous blue symbols, obsidian monuments, restrained mysticism and volumetric haze
cosmic-ritual.material: obsidian, iridescent mineral and cold emissive light
cosmic-ritual.typography: high-contrast serif paired with neutral sans serif
cosmic-ritual.motion: slow ceremonial descent and weightless forward drift
cosmic-ritual.text_strategy: precise DOM/SVG sigils; generated texture only for non-linguistic marks

architectural-white.label: Architectural White
architectural-white.style_prompt: minimal architectural white world, museum-scale spaces, soft daylight, pale grey shadows, exact blue wayfinding accents
architectural-white.material: plaster, limestone, anodized aluminium and clear glass
architectural-white.typography: Swiss grotesk with disciplined grid alignment
architectural-white.motion: steady architectural walkthrough with long sightlines
architectural-white.text_strategy: DOM or SVG signage aligned to scene perspective
